overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game showing a dusk walk through a neon-lit downtown district. The player waits at a crosswalk as a futuristic sedan passes, then walks toward a commercial building with large holographic advertisements.

events.description: futuristic black sedan drives past from left to right across the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk waiting for the vehicle to pass before crossing

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large red neon sign with asian characters on building facade
tall cylindrical skyscraper with rotating digital billboards displaying advertisements
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
illuminated vertical billboard displaying two figures with tennis equipment

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a neon-lit urban intersection at dusk. The player waits at a crosswalk as a futuristic sedan drives past from left to right. Bright red neon signage adorns the building on the left while a cylindrical tower with digital advertisements dominates the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial building entrance with holographic displays

events.description: begins walking forward across the intersection toward the building entrance
approaching the covered building entrance with large illuminated billboard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the commercial building entrance, passing pedestrians on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in colorful outfit walking ahead on the right sidewalk

entered.detail: building entrance canopy with purple neon lighting and glass doors

segments.scene_description: The player begins walking across the intersection and approaches the building entrance. The large vertical billboard with two figures moves from the center to the left of the frame as the player gets closer. The cylindrical tower remains visible on the right while the entrance canopy with purple neon lighting comes into view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a static wait at a neon-lit urban intersection toward the entrance of a commercial building at dusk. It begins at a crosswalk where a futuristic sedan drives past from left to right, framed by bright red neon signage on the left and a towering cylindrical digital advertisement on the right. As the player begins to walk across the intersection, the perspective shifts, causing the large vertical billboard featuring two figures to slide from the center toward the left of the frame. The scene then opens up to reveal the building's entrance ahead, with the cylindrical tower remaining visible on the right as the camera approaches a canopy glowing with purple neon lighting.
